title: AYNV
description: Keep Minecraft familiar with performance boosts, handy quality of life mods and subtle resource packs
body:
# All You Need, Vanilla 
This modpack includes essential mods, resource packs, and shaders

## Mods
- Includes quality of life mods, such as *Trade Cycling*
- Performance mods like *Sodium* are also included to improve your gameplay experience

## Resource packs & Shaders
- The resource packs are very vanilla-like so they don't destroy the original Minecraft feel
- Shaders are also chosen to stay close to the vanilla look for the same reason
### Release Channels
- **Release**: The modpack is only missing up to 2 mods/resource packs/shaders
- **Beta**: The modpack is missing only up to 50% of the planned mods/resource packs/shaders
- **Alpha**: The modpack is missing more than 50% of the planned content

---

This Modpack includes the resource pack *Vanilla Tweaks*.
- Original Source: https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/
